steps.title: Treat x minus 6 as a block
steps.content: Both terms contain the same block, $x-6$: $$4(x-6)+2(x-6)=18$$ Combine them: $$6(x-6)=18$$

steps.title: Solve for the requested value
steps.content: The question asks for $x-6$, not $x$. Divide by $6$: $$x-6=3$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: $3$ is correct, so the answer is Choice A. $9$ would be the value of $x$, but the question asks for $x-6$.
